description_long: This office building is a rectangular, mid-rise structure clad in red brick with a flat roof. The facade features a regular grid of large, rectangular windows with blue-tinted glass and white framing, arranged in two rows per floor. The front side includes a single, dark-colored door as the main entrance, while the other sides are windowed but lack visible entry points. The building's exterior is simple and utilitarian, with no decorative elements or signage, and the brickwork is consistent across all sides. The windows are evenly spaced, contributing to a sense of order and repetition typical of functional office architecture. The overall appearance suggests a practical, modern commercial building designed for efficiency and durability.
description: A rectangular red-brick office building with a flat roof, large blue-tinted windows in a regular grid, and a single dark entrance door on the front facade.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance door at the bottom right and two rows of four large windows above, all set in a red-brick facade.
description_view_1: This side view displays three rows of four evenly spaced windows, with no visible entrance or architectural embellishments.
description_view_2: The rear or alternate side view features the same window grid but is partially obscured by a black diagonal pattern, with no entrance visible.
description_view_3: Another side view with three rows of four windows, similar to view 1, and no visible entrance or unique features.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal and vertical grid of large rectangular windows, evenly spaced in rows and columns on each facade.
